docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NATALIE GUARASCIO RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUARASCIO, NATALIE
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $796.98 FILED BY GUARASCIO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUARASCIO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-05-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $796.98 FILED BY GUARASCIO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE INC.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-14-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
